_meta.notes: marjane.ma returns HTTP 403 for ALL direct requests including robots.txt (Cloudflare WAF protection). Per RFC 9309 §2.2, inaccessible robots.txt is treated as no restrictions. Products sourced from Glovo delivery partner pages (glovoapp.com/ma/*/marjane*) which publish live Marjane Market catalog with MAD prices. Stores covered: Casablanca Marjane Market, Agadir Marjane, Marrakech Marjane, Tanger Marjane, Fes Marjane. Errors (404 on Glovo): epicerie/pates-riz Casablanca slug, epicerie/cafes-thes slug, epicerie/huiles-vinaigres Casablanca slug, epicerie/sucres slug, eaux-boissons/jus-nectars Casablanca slug, eaux-boissons/energisantes slug, fruits-et-legumes/dattes slug, bouskoura store URL changed.
